summary: Implement the Reliable Complaint Data Access Epic in the existing Next.js 16 TypeScript application using four explicit boundaries. A pure complaint domain defines the record, allowed status values, creation input, and validation results. A JSON repository owns all file access, validates stored records on read, serializes writes, and commits a complete versioned store through temporary-file replacement so failed writes do not expose partial JSON. An application service coordinates validation and persistence while mapping records into deliberately limited summary and detail contracts. A dedicated App Router server-action file exposes only asynchronous, validated operations and never returns repository failures or raw stored records. The initial JSON store is workspace-local and writable, matching the approved small file-backed architecture; no API routes, client-side data access, framework migration, or external database are introduced.

modules.name: Complaint Domain
modules.purpose: Own the complaint information contract and deterministic validation rules without depending on persistence or Next.js.

exports.name: ComplaintStatus
exports.signature: type ComplaintStatus = "new" | "in-progress" | "resolved"
exports.purpose: Restrict every complaint to one recognized workflow status.

exports.name: Complaint
exports.signature: interface Complaint { id: string; customerName: string; customerContact: string; subject: string; description: string; status: ComplaintStatus; resolution: string | null; createdAt: string; updatedAt: string; }
exports.purpose: Represent the complete authoritative complaint record stored by the repository.

exports.name: CreateComplaintInput
exports.signature: interface CreateComplaintInput { customerName: string; customerContact: string; subject: string; description: string; }
exports.purpose: Describe the untrusted information accepted when opening a complaint.

exports.name: ComplaintIdentity
exports.signature: interface ComplaintIdentity { id: string; timestamp: string; }
exports.purpose: Supply deterministic server-generated identity and time values when creating a record.

exports.name: ComplaintValidationIssue
exports.signature: interface ComplaintValidationIssue { field: keyof Complaint; message: string; }
exports.purpose: Report a specific invalid complaint field without exposing infrastructure details.

exports.name: ComplaintValidationResult
exports.signature: type ComplaintValidationResult = { ok: true; value: Complaint } | { ok: false; issues: ComplaintValidationIssue[] }
exports.purpose: Return either one validated complaint or independently testable field issues.

exports.name: isComplaintStatus
exports.signature: function isComplaintStatus(value: unknown): value is ComplaintStatus
exports.purpose: Recognize only the approved complaint statuses.

exports.name: parseComplaint
exports.signature: function parseComplaint(value: unknown): ComplaintValidationResult
exports.purpose: Validate an unknown stored value as a complete authoritative complaint.

exports.name: buildComplaint
exports.signature: function buildComplaint(input: CreateComplaintInput, identity: ComplaintIdentity): ComplaintValidationResult
exports.purpose: Validate complaint intake and construct a new record with the initial status and no resolution.

modules.name: JSON Complaint Repository
modules.purpose: Isolate authoritative JSON reads and atomic, serialized writes behind a storage-neutral repository contract.

exports.name: ComplaintRepositoryFailureCode
exports.signature: type ComplaintRepositoryFailureCode = "unavailable" | "malformed" | "write-failed"
exports.purpose: Classify controlled persistence failures without leaking filesystem errors.

exports.name: ComplaintRepositoryFailure
exports.signature: interface ComplaintRepositoryFailure { code: ComplaintRepositoryFailureCode; message: string; }
exports.purpose: Represent a safe persistence failure for the application boundary.

exports.name: ComplaintRepositoryResult
exports.signature: type ComplaintRepositoryResult<T> = { ok: true; value: T } | { ok: false; error: ComplaintRepositoryFailure }
exports.purpose: Make all repository success and failure outcomes explicit.

exports.name: ComplaintRepository
exports.signature: interface ComplaintRepository { list(): Promise<ComplaintRepositoryResult<Complaint[]>>; findById(id: string): Promise<ComplaintRepositoryResult<Complaint | null>>; save(complaint: Complaint): Promise<ComplaintRepositoryResult<Complaint>>; }
exports.purpose: Define retrieval and whole-record persistence independently of JSON and filesystem mechanics.

exports.name: createJsonComplaintRepository
exports.signature: function createJsonComplaintRepository(filePath: string): ComplaintRepository
exports.purpose: Create a repository that validates a versioned complaint store, preserves unrelated records, serializes mutations, and atomically replaces the JSON file.

modules.name: Complaint Application Service
modules.purpose: Coordinate domain validation and persistence while defining the exact complaint information each server interaction may return.

exports.name: ComplaintSummary
exports.signature: interface ComplaintSummary { id: string; subject: string; status: ComplaintStatus; createdAt: string; updatedAt: string; }
exports.purpose: Expose only identifying and status information needed by a complaint register.

exports.name: ComplaintDetail
exports.signature: interface ComplaintDetail { id: string; customerName: string; customerContact: string; subject: string; description: string; status: ComplaintStatus; resolution: string | null; createdAt: string; updatedAt: string; }
exports.purpose: Expose the bounded complaint information needed for individual follow-up.

exports.name: ComplaintOperationFailureCode
exports.signature: type ComplaintOperationFailureCode = "validation" | "not-found" | "storage"
exports.purpose: Classify application-safe operation failures.

exports.name: ComplaintOperationFailure
exports.signature: interface ComplaintOperationFailure { code: ComplaintOperationFailureCode; message: string; fieldErrors?: Record<string, string[]>; }
exports.purpose: Give staff interactions actionable failures without exposing repository or filesystem details.

exports.name: ComplaintListResult
exports.signature: type ComplaintListResult = { ok: true; complaints: ComplaintSummary[] } | { ok: false; error: ComplaintOperationFailure }
exports.purpose: Return either privacy-limited complaint summaries or a controlled failure.

exports.name: ComplaintDetailResult
exports.signature: type ComplaintDetailResult = { ok: true; complaint: ComplaintDetail } | { ok: false; error: ComplaintOperationFailure }
exports.purpose: Return one bounded complaint detail or a controlled failure.

exports.name: CreateComplaintResult
exports.signature: type CreateComplaintResult = { ok: true; complaint: ComplaintDetail } | { ok: false; error: ComplaintOperationFailure }
exports.purpose: Return the newly persisted complaint or safe validation and storage feedback.

exports.name: ComplaintService
exports.signature: interface ComplaintService { listSummaries(): Promise<ComplaintListResult>; getDetail(id: string): Promise<ComplaintDetailResult>; create(input: CreateComplaintInput): Promise<CreateComplaintResult>; }
exports.purpose: Define the complete use-case boundary consumed by server actions.

exports.name: ComplaintServiceDependencies
exports.signature: interface ComplaintServiceDependencies { repository: ComplaintRepository; generateId(): string; now(): string; }
exports.purpose: Inject persistence, identity, and time so application behavior stays deterministic and testable.

exports.name: createComplaintService
exports.signature: function createComplaintService(dependencies: ComplaintServiceDependencies): ComplaintService
exports.purpose: Create the coordinator that validates writes, maps repository failures, and shapes summary and detail outputs.

modules.name: Complaint Server Actions
modules.purpose: Provide the only client-callable complaint boundary as dedicated asynchronous Next.js Server Actions with validated inputs and constrained serialized results.

exports.name: listComplaintSummariesAction
exports.signature: async function listComplaintSummariesAction(): Promise<ComplaintListResult>
exports.purpose: Retrieve only complaint register summaries through the server boundary.

exports.name: getComplaintDetailAction
exports.signature: async function getComplaintDetailAction(id: string): Promise<ComplaintDetailResult>
exports.purpose: Validate an identifier and retrieve one privacy-bounded complaint detail.

exports.name: createComplaintAction
exports.signature: async function createComplaintAction(input: CreateComplaintInput): Promise<CreateComplaintResult>
exports.purpose: Treat submitted complaint information as untrusted, then validate and persist it through the application service.

modules.name: Complaint Data Store
modules.purpose: Provide the versioned initial JSON document used as the authoritative complaint store.
